meanings.definition: (figurative) the act of reforming by the removal of unwanted personnel or practices or conditions
examples: more housecleaning is in store at other accounting firms
many employees were discharged in a general housecleaning by the new owners

meanings.definition: the act of cleaning the rooms and furnishings of a house
examples: efficient housecleaning should proceed one room at a time

meanings.definition: clean and tidy up the house
